summary: Comprehensive testing of checklist app completed successfully. All major features working correctly including task management, swipe gestures, drag and drop, multiple checklists, repeat settings, and local storage persistence.
passed_tests: App loads successfully
Quick add task functionality
Task addition with priority (high/medium/low) and due date
Task completion via checkbox toggle
Completed tasks section with greenish tint (bg-green-50/30)
Completed tasks show strikethrough with green checkbox
Swipe left to delete task (soft delete)
Deleted tasks section with reddish tint (bg-red-50/30)
Deleted tasks show 'deleted' badge in red
Swipe right to complete task (check off)
Drag and drop to reorder active tasks vertically
Drag handle (GripVertical icon) visible on active tasks only
Multiple checklists creation and switching
Checklist rename functionality
Repeat settings dialog (daily/custom count)
Repeat label display on checklist tab (Daily)
Task editing dialog with name, priority, and due date fields
Restore deleted task button (RotateCcw icon)
Permanently delete task button in deleted section (Trash icon)
Local storage persistence across page reloads
Due date display formatting (Today, Tomorrow, MMM d)
Priority badge color coding (red/sky/slate)
Empty state when no tasks
Visual states and color coding working correctly
